resources.title: Discrete Mathematics Overview
resources.description: Khan Academy lesson covering the fundamentals of discrete mathematics, suitable for quiz preparation.

resources.title: Relations Practice (Roster Form)
resources.description: Khan Academy interactive worksheet that asks students to find relations between two sets in roster form.

resources.title: Set Theory Lecture Notes (MIT OCW)
resources.description: MIT OpenCourseWare notes covering set operations, proofs, and related reasoning techniques.

resources.title: Set Theory Practice Quiz
resources.description: Khan Academy quiz that tests understanding of set notation, operations, and basic proof concepts.

resources.title: Relations and Functions Practice
resources.description: Khan Academy worksheet focusing on writing relations in roster and set‑builder form and connecting them to functions.

resources.title: Relations and Functions Quiz
resources.description: A short Khan Academy quiz assessing knowledge of relations, domains, ranges, and function identification.

resources.title: Graph Theory Lecture Notes (MIT OCW)
resources.description: MIT OpenCourseWare notes that outline basic graph terminology, representations, and fundamental properties.

resources.title: Introduction to Graph Theory (Khan Academy)
resources.description: Khan Academy YouTube video introducing vertices, edges, and basic graph concepts, suitable for a quiz review.

resources.title: Graph Traversal Practice
resources.description: Khan Academy worksheet that guides students through depth‑first and breadth‑first search and real‑world applications.

resources.title: Graph Theory Quiz
resources.description: A Khan Academy quiz covering graph representation, traversal, and basic properties.

resources.title: Combinatorics Lecture Notes (MIT OCW)
resources.description: MIT OpenCourseWare notes that summarize counting principles, permutations, combinations, and basic proofs.

resources.title: Combinatorics Practice Quiz
resources.description: Khan Academy quiz testing fundamental counting techniques and basic combinatorial reasoning.

resources.title: Advanced Combinatorics
resources.description: Brilliant.org article covering inclusion‑exclusion, generating functions, and recurrence relations for advanced problems.

resources.title: Combinatorics Quiz (Khan Academy)
resources.description: A follow‑up Khan Academy quiz focusing on more challenging combinatorial concepts.

resources.title: Discrete Mathematics Overview
resources.description: Wikipedia article providing a broad overview of discrete mathematics topics to inspire final project ideas.
